_meta.derivation: earliest commit per author_login from commits.json; enrich via /commits/{sha} for files/stats

data.author: cottsay
data.message: Update kilted track to release the same version as the source distribution.

files.patch:
@@ -102,7 +102,8 @@ tracks:
     ros_distro: kilted
     vcs_type: git
     vcs_uri: https://github.com/Fields2Cover/ortools_vendor
-    version: :{auto}
+    version: 9.9.0
+    version_saved: :{auto}
   noetic:
     actions:
     - bloom-export-upstream :{vcs_local_uri} :{vcs_type} --tag :{release_tag} --display-uri

data.author: marcoag
data.message: Update jazzy track to release the same version as the source distribution.

files.patch:
@@ -76,7 +76,8 @@ tracks:
     ros_distro: jazzy
     vcs_type: git
     vcs_uri: https://github.com/Fields2Cover/ortools_vendor
-    version: :{auto}
+    version: 9.9.0
+    version_saved: :{auto}
   noetic:
     actions:
     - bloom-export-upstream :{vcs_local_uri} :{vcs_type} --tag :{release_tag} --display-uri
